def negative_middleware_creates_http_client_per_request():
    rule_id = "middleware_creates_http_client_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Middleware creates HTTP clients per request instead of reusing app-scoped clients."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
